rationale: The wrangler skill is a CLI wrapper that primarily spawns the wrangler binary (via npm/npx) for Cloudflare Workers operations. It reads/writes wrangler.jsonc config, generates TypeScript types, manages migrations, and uses local state in .wrangler/state. It connects to Cloudflare APIs for deployment, KV/R2/D1/Vectorize operations, and fetches docs from developers.cloudflare.com. Container operations imply docker subprocess, and npm install is needed to bootstrap wrangler itself.
